subject: Lease Negotiation Update - New Office Space
body:
Facilities and Finance,

Update on the new office lease negotiation at 500 Market Street:

Space: 22,000 sq ft across floors 8-9
Term: 7 years with 5-year renewal option

Negotiated Terms:
- Base rent: $62/sq ft/year (down from asking $72)
- Annual escalation: 2.5% (down from 3%)
- Tenant improvement allowance: $85/sq ft ($1.87M total)
- Free rent period: 6 months
- Security deposit: 3 months rent ($341K)

Financial Impact:
- Year 1 effective rent: $31/sq ft (after free rent)
- Total 7-year commitment: $10.8M
- ASC 842 right-of-use asset: $8.9M
- Monthly operating expense: $114K (vs current $78K)

The TI allowance covers our buildout budget. Architect estimates 4-month construction timeline. Target move-in: September 2026.

Need approval from CFO and CEO to sign the LOI by March 22nd.
